name: New-patient intake → SMS follow-up → booking link + confirmation email
description: When the new-patient intake form is submitted, wait 2 minutes, then text the contact by name to thank them, have a short SMS conversation to confirm insurance and preferred visit time, and finally email them a confirmation with the clinic address and the new-patient consultation booking link.

steps.initial_message: Hi {{first_name}}, it's Bright Smile Dental 🦷 Thanks so much for reaching out — we're looking forward to meeting you. When would be a good day and time for your free new-patient consultation? Also, just to confirm: do you have dental insurance (yes / no / unsure)? No pressure either way, we'll take great care of you.
steps.exit_when: contact has shared a preferred visit time AND confirmed insurance status (yes/no/unsure)

extract.preferred_time: string — contact's preferred day/time for the consultation

args.subject: Your Bright Smile new-patient consultation — next steps 🦷
args.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Thanks again for getting in touch with Bright Smile Dental — we can't wait to meet you.

You mentioned you'd like to come in around: {{preferred_time}}.
Insurance on file: {{insurance_status}} (totally fine either way — the new-patient consultation is free).

To lock in the exact slot, pick a time that works for you here:
https://brightsmile.app.seldonframe.com/book/appt_new_patient_consult

Where to find us:
Bright Smile Dental
(Your clinic address here — please update in workspace settings)

If anything comes up or you'd rather we just pick a time for you, reply to this email or text us back — we're happy to handle it.

Talk soon,
The Bright Smile team
